# Halftone Dithering FX

## What this site is
Halftone Dithering FX is a free, browser-based tool that turns photos and video into halftone dot art and dithered images. It runs fully client-side and never uploads your files.

## Primary actions
- Convert an image or video to a halftone / dithered effect in the browser
- Choose error-diffusion (Floyd–Steinberg, Jarvis–Judice–Ninke, Stucki, Burkes) or ordered / noise dithering
- Adjust dot grid size, contrast, gamma, smoothing, and mark shape
- Compare original vs result with a split preview
- Export PNG, SVG (vector dots), or WebM video
